message:
feat(service): add service discovery trait and DNS implementation (asupersync-2a168)

Discover trait with Change<K> enum for endpoint topology changes.
StaticList for fixed endpoints, DnsServiceDiscovery for DNS-based
polling with interval control and set-diff computation. 23 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
